text: Code reviews are an essential part of software development. In this process, one or more team members check a developer’s code before it is added to the main project. A key advantage is catching bugs early. When someone else reviews the code, they often spot mistakes or unclear parts that the original writer missed. This saves time and effort later. Additionally, code reviews encourage knowledge sharing. Team members learn different coding styles, techniques, and parts of the project they might not work on daily. Ultimately, this improves overall team quality, as everyone grows their skills and produces better, more consistent code together.
